articles.title: LIVE: King Charles lands in Washington for first U.S visit as monarch amid Trump’s Iran war tensions
articles.description: Britain’s monarch King Charles III arrives in Washington for his first official U.S. state visit as king marking a historic moment as America prepares to celebrate 250 years of independence. The four-day visit, alongside Queen Camilla, includes high-profile engagements in Washington, New York, and Virginia, with a key meeting scheduled at the White House with Donald Trump and First Lady Melania Trump.

articles.title: Chirag urges govt to protect poor during anti-encroachment drive
articles.description: Chirag Paswan has called for sensitive action against illegal structures on government land, urging the Bihar government to ensure no poor or deserving families are unjustly displaced. He stressed the need for alternative housing before demolitions and advocated for upholding the rule of law while protecting legitimate homes.

articles.title: West Asia in focus as SCO Defence Ministers assemble in Bishkek
articles.description: Defence minister Rajnath Singh will attend the Shanghai Cooperation Organisation Defence Ministers' meeting in Bishkek. Geopolitical developments and the West Asia situation will be key discussion points. India will emphasize its commitment to global peace and zero tolerance for terrorism. The meeting will also explore ways to mitigate the impact of ongoing conflicts. Bilateral talks with counterparts are also scheduled.

articles.title: Indo-US ties: Top Air Force commander visits India to deepen strategic partnership; details inside
articles.description: US Pacific Air Forces Commander Kevin Schneider visited India to strengthen defence relations between the two countries. Scroll down for more.

articles.title: BJP accuses RJD leader of spreading falsehoods
articles.description: Bihar BJP chief Sanjay Saraogi has strongly refuted Tejashwi Yadav's claims regarding the Mukhyamantri Mahila Rojgar Yojana, labeling them as "falsehoods and political desperation." Saraogi asserted that the NDA government has empowered women, contrasting it with the RJD's past rule, and dismissed Tejashwi's criticism of Amit Shah as "undignified remarks" for cheap popularity.

articles.title: Proposal to increase retirement age of judicial officers in Tamil Nadu under consideration: Chief Justice
articles.description: Proposal to extend retirement age for Tamil Nadu judicial officers from 60 to 61 or 62 is under consideration, says Chief Justice.

articles.title: Internal reservation: Nomadic and micro communities to question latest matrix in Karnataka HIgh Court
articles.description: Nomadic and micro communities in Karnataka continue legal fight for separate internal reservation after Cabinet's controversial decision.

articles.title: After Iran-Oman Hormuz transit talk, India hopeful
articles.description: India watches closely as Iran's Foreign Minister signals safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz after Oman talks. This critical waterway is vital for global oil transit. Oman's mediation role is growing. India has navigated recent diplomatic challenges for its ships. The passage of Indian vessels has recently slowed.

articles.title: Beginning of unravelling of AAP: Sukhbir Singh Badal
articles.description: Shiromani Akali Dal leader Sukhbir Singh Badal states AAP's Rajya Sabha MPs joining BJP marks the party's decline. He predicts a direct contest between Akali Dal and Congress in Punjab's upcoming elections. Badal asserts Akali Dal remains the state's rooted political force, committed to serving the people. He believes voters will support a regional party in 2027.

articles.description: 'For our part, we will do everything that serves your interests, the interests of all the people of the region, so that peace can be achieved as soon as possible,' Russian state media quoted Putin as telling Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi.

articles.description: In the 2024 Lok Sabha polls, the BJP improved its footprint and led in 21 of these segments, while the TMC stayed ahead in 90.

articles.title: Karnataka: May 9 Yediyurappa event may turn out to be Vijayendra’s show of strength
articles.description: Union Home Minister Amit Shah will attend a major event in Karnataka celebrating BS Yediyurappa's 50 years in public life. The gathering aims to showcase Yediyurappa's son, BY Vijayendra, as a strong political successor. Organizers hope the event will unite the BJP and energize party cadres.

articles.title: Putin Hosts Iran’s Top Diplomat in St. Petersburg
articles.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin held talks with Abbas Araghchi and said Moscow would do everything in its power, alongside regional states, to help bring peace to the Middle East as soon as possible.

articles.title: BJP petitions Bengaluru police to stop event supporting Umar Khalid
articles.description: The event will feature a reading of excerpts from the book 'Umar Khalid and His World', with panellists including writer-historians Janaki Nair and Ramachandra Guha and actor Prakash Raj.

articles.title: Dhanush Lifts Fan Who Knelt To Touch His Feet At Kara Event, Viral Video Sparks Debate Online
articles.description: At the pre-release event of Kara in Hyderabad, Dhanush had a viral fan encounter when a woman knelt to touch his feet. The actor, visibly uncomfortable, gently lifted her up and interacted with her before posing for a photo. The video sparked mixed reactions online, with some calling it a heartfelt fan moment while others criticised celebrity worship. Dhanush also delivered a motivational message on self-belief. Kara, a heist action-thriller, is set to release worldwide on April 30, 2026.

articles.title: Officials told to work in a coordinated manner to benefit SCs, STs
articles.description: Karnataka officials urged to coordinate efforts to ensure justice and benefits for Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes communities.

articles.title: Maharashtra MSBSHSE HSC result 2026 within this week, says official amid protest concerns
articles.description: Maharashtra State Board officials have assured that the MSBSHSE HSC results will be announced within the week, dismissing concerns about delays due to employee protests. Authorities confirmed that result preparation and verification are progressing on schedule. Anxiety had risen among students following media reports of disruptions, but the board reiterated there would be no impact. Results will be available online and via DigiLocker, with uploads already in the final stage of completion.

articles.title: Hormuz shut, US blockade failing: Trump's Iran gamble causes chaos, oil prices surge to...| IRGC
articles.description: Donald Trump’s cancelled talks with Iran, the U.S. blockade in the Strait of Hormuz, and failed “maximum pressure” tactics have triggered one of the worst energy crises in modern history. Oil prices are now nearly 48% higher than February. This crisis is hitting ordinary people, fueling inflation, and exposing the limits of U.S. power in the Persian Gulf. Chevron CEO Mike Wirth warns the global energy system has lost its “flexibility”, while the head of the International Energy Agency, Fatih Birol, says today’s crisis is even worse than the legendary oil shocks of 1973, 1979, and 2022 combined.

articles.title: Watch: US–Iran talks stall as new Hormuz proposal raises stakes
articles.description: Talks between the United States and Iran have entered a new phase of uncertainty after planned negotiations in Islamabad failed to take place. According to reports, Iran has now floated a proposal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and end the war first, while delaying nuclear negotiations. The move puts Washington in a dilemma, balancing de-escalation with pressure over Iran’s nuclear programme. #USIranTensions #StraitOfHormuz #Geopolitics

articles.title: AAP vs Chadha Fallout: 'Core Leaders Felt Marginalised', Says Vikramjit Sahney - EXCLUSIVE
articles.description: Rajya Sabha MP Vikramjit Singh Sahney explains AAP split, cites sidelining of leaders like Raghav Chadha, in an exclusive interview with Times Now.

articles.title: “Bound To Happen”: Congress MLA’s Take On Trump Event Shooting
articles.description: Congress leader Vijay Wadettiwar has stirred a political controversy with his comments on an attack involving US President Donald Trump, made during a public event in Nagpur, Maharashtra. Referring to the incident, he used the phrase “Jaisi karni waisi bharni,” implying that actions lead to consequences. Wadettiwar further alleged that Trump had disturbed multiple countries while in power and claimed that his policies caused damage to the United States. He also drew a parallel with India, saying there is a perception among people that the country is heading on a similar path of decline. His remarks have drawn strong reactions from political circles, with criticism over the tone and content of his statement.

articles.title: Suspended Haryana Congress MLA breaks ranks, backs BJP govt on women’s quota
articles.description: Defying the Congress boycott, the Ratia legislator attended the special assembly session to criticise his own party leadership and support the Nayab Singh Saini-led BJP government’s resolution.

articles.title: Madras High Court dismisses second assets case against Vijay over election affidavit
articles.description: The Madras High Court has dismissed the second petition filed against Vijay questioning the assets declared by him in his election nomination papers for the Perambur Assembly constituency in this year’s Tamil Nadu Assembly polls.

articles.title: Jammu and Kashmir school declared 'unlawful entity' over links with banned outfit Jamaat-e-Islami
articles.description: A school in Shopian, Jammu and Kashmir, has been declared an unlawful entity under UAPA. Authorities found credible evidence linking the institution to the banned Jamaat-e-Islami, with individuals affiliated with the group allegedly controlling its administration and academics. Concerns were also raised about financial irregularities and the institution fostering radicalization, with past students reportedly involved in militant activities.

articles.title: She Finally Faced Her Fear Of Rejection And The Response Was Unexpected
articles.description: A small moment at an airplane turned into a viral story after a simple ask got an unexpectedly warm response

articles.title: '80 isn't the age to fight': SC urges negotiated settlement in case between Sanjay Kapur's mother and wife
articles.description: Rani Kapur has claimed that she has been stripped of her entire legacy, including her residence and other movable and immovable properties, and has sought urgent safeguards to prevent any diversion of assets.
